title: tarenna cumingiana
intro: Tarenna cumingiana, also known as the Cuming's tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits associated with Tarenna cumingiana include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in the management of diabetes and hypertension. Tarenna cumingiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically used in traditional medicine practices.
